data.name: MARBLE MIRAGE
data.detailed_description:
STORY

Snow seals you inside a luxurious men’s spa. A guest is found dead. Your memory is fractured. Among the group of alluring men, one may be the killer. Suspicion grows, desire blurs with danger, and a tarot reading whispers of fate: The Devil. Death. The Lovers.

GAMEPLAY

As Lucas, you’ll collect evidence, solve puzzles, and unravel the mysteries of Marble House. With six romance options, every bond you form could lead to passion - or peril.

FEATURES

  • Erotic thriller mystery - a snowbound luxury spa becomes a stage for murder, secrets, and desire.

  • Choices that matter - Lucas’s Charm, Guile, and Sense shape dialogue and relationships.

  • Investigative gameplay - explore environments, collect clues, and expose the killer.

  • Glass puzzles - reassemble fractured memory shards as Lucas uncovers the truth.

  • Six romanceable characters - pursue relationships and unlock explicit scenes.

  • Partially voiced - characters react with voiced emotes for added immersion.

  • Multiple endings - find love, solve the mystery, or fail entirely.

  • Gallery - unlock CGs and Tarot cards as the story unfolds.

Note from the Developer

As a solo developer, this game has been a labor of love for several years.

I am excited for players to enjoy the game for its narrative, atmosphere, and relationships.

data.short_description: A homoerotic thriller visual novel set in a luxurious men’s spa. Investigate a murder, pursue romance, solve puzzles, and uncover dangerous secrets.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10, Windows 11
  • 處理器: Quad-core Intel or AMD, 2.5 GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 8 GB RAM MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11 or 12 compatible GPU with 2GB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

  • Processor: Quad-core Intel or AMD, 2.5 GHz or faster
